title: Dana Bay fire: Volunteers needed for wildlife search and rescue
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"DANA BAY NEWS -  The Dana Bay Conservancy, Wildlife Crime Information Network (WCIN), a team from Garden Route SPCA Mossel Bay, Cango Wildlife from Oudtshoorn and several volunteers are conducting a search-and-rescue operation for the wildlife in the green belts affected by the wildfires yesterday, Tuesday, 25 November.","html":"DANA BAY NEWS - The Dana Bay Conservancy, Wildlife Crime Information Network (WCIN), a team from Garden Route SPCA Mossel Bay, Cango Wildlife from Oudtshoorn and several volunteers are conducting a search-and-rescue operation for the wildlife in the green belts affected by the wildfires yesterday, Tuesday, 25 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The operation began early this morning already in the burnt areas, and volunteers are urgently needed, said the Dana Bay Wildlife Search and Rescue group."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Volunteers will help with scanning affected areas for injured or distressed wildlife, reporting any sightings and locations and safely transporting animals in need of care.","html":"Volunteers will help with scanning affected areas for injured or distressed wildlife, reporting any sightings and locations and safely transporting animals in need of care."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"No prior experience is required, only a willingness to walk through the burnt terrain, following safety guidelines, and working as part of a coordinated team,\" said the group.","html":"\"No prior experience is required, only a willingness to walk through the burnt terrain, following safety guidelines, and working as part of a coordinated team,\" said the group."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Erika van der Westhuizen of the Dana Bay Conservancy, the next search began at 10:15 this morning.","html":"According to Erika van der Westhuizen of the Dana Bay Conservancy, the next search began at 10:15 this morning."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Volunteers who still want to join the operation can contact Leon Rossouw of the WCIN on 079 240 3491, to find out where they can meet the group."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The group will attempt to cover the entire affected area, says Van der Westhuizen.","html":"The group will attempt to cover the entire affected area, says Van der Westhuizen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is unclear how long the wildlife search and rescue operation is expected to continue for, as it is dependent on how many volunteers join.","html":"It is unclear how long the wildlife search and rescue operation is expected to continue for, as it is dependent on how many volunteers join."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By 07:00 this morning, crews from the Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management services were still present on the scene.","html":"By 07:00 this morning, crews from the Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management services were still present on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The perimeter is under control with a few hot spots within. The team is monitoring and extinguishing flare-ups as necessary,\" said Ward 11 cllr, Nickey le Roux.","html":"\"The perimeter is under control with a few hot spots within. The team is monitoring and extinguishing flare-ups as necessary,\" said Ward 11 cllr, Nickey le Roux."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Flora Road was re-opened for motorists entering and exiting Dana Bay yesterday afternoon."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To join the Dana Bay Wildlife Search and Rescue group and become a volunteer, click here to gain access to a WhatsApp group where updates will be shared.","html":"To join the Dana Bay Wildlife Search and Rescue group and become a volunteer, click here to gain access to a WhatsApp group where updates will be shared."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Further communication about the search and recue operation will only be shared on the new group. For any other enquiries, contact Rossouw.","html":"Further communication about the search and recue operation will only be shared on the new group. For any other enquiries, contact Rossouw."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Dana Bay fire: Flora Road opened","Dana Bay fire - what you need to know","Danabaai nooduitgang beskikbaar gestel weens veldbrand"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
